name: Bug report
about: Something doesn't work the way it should.
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened

One paragraph. Concrete.

## What you expected

One paragraph.

## How to reproduce

Numbered steps, or a minimal Go program that exhibits the issue.

```go
// ...
```

## Environment

- Component: `<name>` at `<version>` from the manifest.
- Glyph CLI version: output of `glyph -version` (or commit SHA if built from source).
- Go: output of `go version`.
- OS and terminal: e.g. macOS 15.3, iTerm2 3.5.

## Anything else

Logs, screenshots, related issues. Skip the section if there's nothing to add.
